brief: Transform deprecated gen_ai.request.messages values into the newer gen_ai.input.messages format.

inputs.brief: Deprecated request messages attribute to transform.

actions: If gen_ai.input.messages is already present, keep it and do not overwrite it.
Read gen_ai.request.messages as a JSON array of message objects.
For each message object, move content to parts.
If content is a string, convert it to a text part with type="text" and content set to the string.
If content is an array, use it as parts and, for text parts that only have text, also set content to the same value.
Preserve message fields that are not renamed, such as role and response_metadata.
Write the transformed messages to gen_ai.input.messages.
Remove gen_ai.request.messages once the deprecated attribute is normalized.

examples.name: system and user messages with metadata

input.gen_ai.request.messages: [{"role":"system","content":"You are a helpful assistant.","response_metadata":{}},{"role":"user","content":"What is the capital of France?","response_metadata":{}}]

output.gen_ai.input.messages: [{"role":"system","response_metadata":{},"parts":[{"type":"text","content":"You are a helpful assistant."}]},{"role":"user","response_metadata":{},"parts":[{"type":"text","content":"What is the capital of France?"}]}]

examples.name: system and user messages with array content

input.gen_ai.request.messages: [{"role":"system","content":[{"text":"A helpful assistant that answers questions","type":"text"}]},{"role":"user","content":[{"text":"What is the capital of France?","type":"text"}]}]

output.gen_ai.input.messages: [{"role":"system","parts":[{"text":"A helpful assistant that answers questions","type":"text","content":"A helpful assistant that answers questions"}]},{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"What is the capital of France?","type":"text","content":"What is the capital of France?"}]}]
[{"role":"user","parts":[{"type":"text","text":"What is the capital of France?","content":"What is the capital of France?"}]}]
